title: Determination of Stability Constants of the Complexes of 4-Hydroxy-3-aldehydobiphenyl with Cu2+, Ni2+, Co2+, Zn2+ and Mg2+
author: M. S. MAYADEO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Ramnaraiu Ruia College, Matunga, Bombay-400 019 

  Manuscript received 17 February 1982, accepted 10 December 1982  

 Complexation equilibria of metal complexes of Cu 2+ , Ni 2+ , Co 2+ , Zn 2+  and Mg 2+  with 4-hydroxy-3-aldehydobiphenyl have been studied potentiometrically. The proton dissociation constant of the reagent and the dissociation constants of its metal com­plexes have been determined by Bjerrum-Calvin  \(p\) H titration technique as adopted by Irving and Rossotti at 30  \(\pm\)  0.1° and at ionic strength of  µ = 0.1  M  in 75 : 25 v/v dioxane-water medium. The order of the stability constants of the chelates was found to be Cu>Zn>Co>Ni>Mg.
